name: @onboarding-loop/web
description: onboardingloop.ai marketing site — Astro + React, composed from the design system's own components (imported via the @ alias to the repo root). Its build toolchain (astro + its vite) lives here in site/node_modules so it does not disturb the repo's own vite 6 (used by the styleguide); React and the component runtime deps still resolve up to the repo root, so a component edit reaches both apps.
